project_type: Static HTML/CSS/JS portfolio website (converting from Hugo)
build_system: None - static files served directly by GitHub Pages
build_command: No build step needed - static HTML/CSS/JS
test_command: Validate HTML structure exists and files are in place: ls index.html css/style.css js/main.js images/
verification_instructions: 1. Verify index.html exists at repo root. 2. Verify css/style.css and js/main.js exist. 3. Verify images directory contains me_.jpg, tempImageuVymn1_adobe_express.jpeg, projects/Colorization3.png, projects/doge4.jpeg, projects/advert1.jpeg. 4. Verify Hugo-specific files (config.yaml, themes/, content/, hugo, .hugo_build.lock, public/) are removed. 5. Verify .github/workflows is updated for static site deployment.
setup_instructions: No setup needed - pure static site with no dependencies
environment_constraints: INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network mode - no npm install, no CDN access, no external package downloads. All CSS and JS must be written inline/locally. Use system font stacks instead of Google Fonts.
key_patterns: Single page application with sections for hero, about, experience, education, achievements, projects, contact. Dark mode default with theme toggle. All data from config.yaml must be preserved. Images referenced from images/ directory at repo root.
relevant_files: images/ (to create by moving from static/images/)
directory_structure: Current: Hugo site with config.yaml, content/, static/images/, public/ (built output), .github/workflows/. Target: index.html at root, css/, js/, images/ directories, .github/workflows/ updated.
